directors.name: Randall C. Stuewe
directors.bio_summary: Randall C. Stuewe serves as Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer of Darling Ingredients Inc. He holds the combined role pursuant to his employment agreement and subject to continued election by stockholders.

directors.name: Gary W. Mize
directors.bio_summary: Gary W. Mize serves as the independent Lead Director of Darling Ingredients Inc. and chairs the nominating and corporate governance committee. He was elected annually by the Board to serve in the Lead Director role with well-defined duties including chairing executive sessions and coordinating committee work.

directors.name: Charles Adair
directors.bio_summary: Charles Adair is an independent director and chairs the audit committee of Darling Ingredients Inc. He has been designated as an audit committee financial expert by the Board.

directors.name: Beth Albright
directors.bio_summary: Beth Albright is an independent director serving on both the audit committee and the compensation committee of Darling Ingredients Inc.

directors.name: Celeste A. Clark
directors.bio_summary: Celeste A. Clark is an independent director of Darling Ingredients Inc. who served during all or part of fiscal year 2022.

directors.name: Linda Goodspeed
directors.bio_summary: Linda Goodspeed is an independent director and serves as Chairwoman of the compensation committee of Darling Ingredients Inc. She also serves on the nominating and corporate governance committee.

directors.name: Enderson Guimaraes
directors.bio_summary: Enderson Guimaraes is an independent director serving on both the audit committee and the compensation committee of Darling Ingredients Inc.

directors.name: Mary R. Korby
directors.bio_summary: Mary R. Korby is an independent director serving on both the nominating and corporate governance committee and the compensation committee of Darling Ingredients Inc.

directors.name: Dirk Kloosterboer
directors.bio_summary: Dirk Kloosterboer is an independent director of Darling Ingredients Inc. who served during all or part of fiscal year 2022.

directors.name: Michael E. Rescoe
directors.bio_summary: Michael E. Rescoe is an independent director serving on the audit committee of Darling Ingredients Inc. and has been designated as an audit committee financial expert by the Board.

directors.name: Larry Barden
directors.bio_summary: Larry Barden was appointed to the Board in January 2023. He retired as a partner from Sidley Austin LLP on December 31, 2022, an international law firm that the company engages for legal services.

directors.name: Kurt Stoffel
directors.bio_summary: Kurt Stoffel is a new director nominee for Darling Ingredients Inc. who has been determined to meet the independence requirements of the NYSE and the SEC.

extraction_notes: The provided proxy text excerpt covers primarily corporate governance sections and does not include individual director biographies with ages, tenure, or detailed prior employment history. Committee assignments were extracted from committee descriptions. No executive officer section was included in the provided text. Role assignments for committee chairs are based on committee membership descriptions. Ages and tenure are unavailable from the provided text.
